description: VERIFIED LIVE: 小红书 (Xiaohongshu/RED) via content-script DOM extraction — no login. The Explore feed renders note cards in the DOM (behind a dismissable login nudge); each card has a .title, an author .name, and a /explore/<id> link (with the xsec_tok needed to open it). Navigate the tab to xiaohongshu.com/explore (or a channel) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 72 note links; title + author + url extracted correctly. Note: 小红书's JSON API is signature-protected, so this reads the rendered cards, not the API.

tools.name: xiaohongshu_notes
tools.description: Note cards on the current 小红书 Explore/channel page. Navigate the tab to xiaohongshu.com/explore first. Returns each note's title, author and url (/explore/<id> including the xsec_tok). VERIFIED (72 notes).
